codes.KG_R_GDP_USD: kg per dollar of GDP in USD
codes.KGCO2E_R_KG: Kg of CO2E per Kg of Product
codes.PCT: Percentage change (code value to be discontinued)
codes.PE: Euro, converted using purchasing power parities (PPS = EUR for EU28)
codes.PE_B6: Euro, converted using purchasing power parities (PPS = EUR for EU27 as of 31 January 2020 (brexit))
codes.PE_R_B6: Euro, converted using purchasing power parities; ratio to EU27 as of 31 January 2020 (brexit)
codes.PE_R_B6_POP: Euro, converted using purchasing power parities; ratio to EU27 as of 31 January 2020 (brexit) per capita
codes.PU: US dollar, converted using purchasing power parities
codes.TNMVOCE_R_POP: Tonnes of NMVOC equivalent per capita
codes.X10: All currencies except EUR, domestic currency
codes.X5: All currencies except EUR, JPY, USD
codes.X6: All currencies except EUR, CHF, GBP, JPY, USD
codes.X7: All currencies except EUR, USD, JPY, GBP, CHF, domestic currency
codes.X8: All currencies except USD, EUR, GBP, JPY, CHF, CNY, AUD, CAD
codes.X9: All currencies except EUR, USD, JPY, domestic currency
codes.XDB: Currencies included in the SDR basket, gold and SDRs
codes.XDC: Domestic currency (incl. conversion to current currency made using a fixed parity)
codes.XDC_R_B1N: Domestic currency (incl. conversion to current currency made using a fixed parity); ratio to net value added
codes.XDC_R_B1N_CY: Domestic currency (incl. conversion to current currency made using a fixed parity); ratio to annual moving sum of sector specific net value added

codes.XDC_R_GF10: Domestic currency (incl. conversion to current currency made using a fixed parity); ratio to total expenditure in social protection
codes.XDC_R_I8: Domestic currency (incl. conversion to current currency made using a fixed parity); ratio to Euro area 19
codes.XDD: Currencies included in the SDR basket (USD, EUR, JPY, GBP, CNY)
codes.XDF: Domestic currency (incl. conversion to current currency made using a fixed parity or market exchange rate)
codes.XDM: Domestic currency (incl. conversion to current currency made using market exchange rate)
codes.XDN: Domestic currency (currency previously used by a country before joining a Monetary Union)
codes.XDO: Other currencies not included in the SDR basket, excluding gold and SDRs
codes.XTS: Codes specifically reserved for testing purposes
codes.XXX: Transactions where no currency is involved

codes.EUR_R_U2: Euro; ratio to Euro Area (changing composition)
codes.PN_R_CT0: Pure number; ratio to total credit transfers
codes.XDF_R_CT0: Domestic currency (incl. conversion to current currency made using a fixed parity or market exchange rate); ratio to total credit transfers

codes.XDF_R_CP0: Domestic currency (incl. conversion to current currency made using a fixed parity or market exchange rate); ratio to total card payments
codes.EUR_R_CP0: Euro; ratio to total card payments

codes.XDF_R_EMP0: Domestic currency (incl. conversion to current currency made using a fixed parity or market exchange rate); ratio to total e-money payments
codes.EUR_R_EMP0: Euro; ratio to total e-money payments
codes.PN_R_F22A: Pure number per number of overnight deposits
codes.PN_R_TT: Pure number; ratio to total number payment transactions
codes.XDF_R_TT: Domestic currency (incl. conversion to current currency made using a fixed parity or market exchange rate); ratio to total value payment transactions
codes.EUR_R_TT: Euro; ratio to total value payment transactions
codes.XDF_R_PNT: Domestic currency (incl. conversion to current currency made using a fixed parity or market exchange rate); ratio to number of transactions
codes.EUR_R_PNT: Euro; ratio to number of transactions
codes.XDF_R_POP6: Domestic currency (incl. conversion to current currency made using a fixed parity or market exchange rate) per million inhabitants

codes.XDF_R_B1GQ: Domestic currency (incl. conversion to current currency made using a fixed parity or market exchange rate); ratio to GDP
